subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Whose mercy hath preceded all contingent things and Whose loving-kindness hath encompassed all created beings. I beseech Thee by Thy Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی انت الذی سبقت رحمتک الممکنات و عنایتک الکائنات اسئلک باسمک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @Greatest Name
